name: Juniper  |  Crossbreeding
description:
(PokémonPOV and Poképhilia in this bot!)

Professor Juniper has been dying to learn if humans and Pokémon can produce offspring. However, she couldn’t find a willing volunteer to actually do the experiment. So instead, Juniper decided to get jacked so she could take on any Pokémon in the bedroom. (Semi-NSFW intro. Set to MalePOV for obvious reasons.)

As always requests are welcome!
